oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Cattle handling systems for efficiency
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Hilton, W. Mark
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: cattle handling
bud box
pressure and release
acclimation
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: When beef producers are surveyed and asked why routine herd health procedures like pregnancy checking cows are not done, inadequate facilities generally rank first or second. This can range from no facilities to an attitude of “it’s just not worth it” due to anticipated stress on both animals and people when working cattle. Because we see both good and bad facilities, we are well-positioned to assist our producers in designing or im­proving their handling facilities.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; No. 1 (2026): 2026 Recent Graduate Conference Proceedings; 71-72
